description_long: This sculpture features a striking arrangement of angular, black, textured geometric forms rising vertically from a rectangular base. The central element is the tallest, flanked by progressively shorter, slanted blocks, creating a dynamic, fan-like silhouette. Two prominent, curved, white horn-like projections emerge symmetrically from the sides of the central form, adding a dramatic contrast in both color and shape. The surface of the black elements appears rough and glossy, catching light in a way that emphasizes their faceted structure. The overall composition is abstract, evoking a sense of movement and tension. The sculpture's bold, modern aesthetic makes it a visually commanding presence suitable for urban public spaces.
description: An abstract, black geometric sculpture with rough, glossy surfaces and two white horn-like projections, arranged in a dynamic, fan-like composition.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical placement of the white horns and the vertical alignment of the black geometric forms.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the staggered, slanted arrangement of the black blocks and the full length of one white horn.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backs of the geometric forms, with the horns barely visible and the textured surfaces prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other white horn and the layered, angular structure of the sculpture.
attribute_subject_matter: abstract geometric forms with horn-like projections
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be suited for an outdoor plaza, park, or urban streetscape.
